name: Clerk
description: Monitor Clerk user authentication — verify user access and authentication configuration

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Clerk Dashboard at https://dashboard.clerk.com
2. Select your application
3. Go to API Keys in the left sidebar
4. Copy the Secret Key (starts with sk_)
5. Paste it below

Note: Use the Secret Key (not the Publishable Key). The Secret Key provides backend API access.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Clerk users and their authentication status

checks.name: 2FA
checks.description: Verifies Clerk MFA is configured for enhanced authentication security
